items.title: CNN sues Perplexity, alleging unlawful distribution of copyrighted content
items.summary: Perplexity unlawfully copied thousands of CNN stories, videos and images to power its products, CNN said in its lawsuit.

items.title: How War Changed Eid in Lebanon
items.summary: After nearly three years of war and displacement, Eid in Lebanon no longer feels like celebration for many families.

items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

items.title: Carney: Kanada će pomoći da Amerika ponovno postane velika
items.summary: KANADSKI premijer Carney pozvao je na novo partnerstvo sa SAD-om kako bi se ojačale obje zemlje i pomoglo Americi da ponovno postane velika.

items.title: Vlada daje milijune za crkvene projekte u BiH, Srbiji i SAD-u
items.summary: VLADA će s 3,55 milijuna eura financirati pet projekata Katoličke crkve u BiH, Srbiji i SAD-u, pri čemu je najveći iznos, 1,2 milijuna eura, dodijeljen Srijemskoj biskupiji, rečeno je na potpisivanju ugovora u Središnjem državnom uredu za Hrvate izvan RH.

items.title: UN ‘adds Israel to blacklist’ for conflict-related sexual violence
items.summary: Israeli ambassador to the UN says Tel Aviv will cut ties with UN chief Antonio Guterres over the upcoming report.

items.title: Portugal breaks hottest May day record as Europe swelters in heatwave
items.summary: French students are taking their exams in baking schools, while red alerts are issued in Italy.

items.title: Latvia parliament approves new gov’t after drone dispute toppled coalition
items.summary: Latvia's government reform ensures a pro-Western path as regional drone incidents heighten security concerns.

items.title: Francuska ukinula zakon iz 17. stoljeća
items.summary: FRANCUSKI parlament jednoglasno je ukinuo "Code Noir", zakon iz 17. stoljeća koji je porobljene ljude tretirao kao vlasništvo, gotovo 180 godina nakon formalnog ukidanja ropstva u Francuskoj.

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: US inflation surges to three-year high amid tensions with Iran
items.summary: Heightened petrol prices led the inflationary pressures, with prices that jumped 5.5 percent in April.

items.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll
items.summary: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

items.title: VIDEO Blizu Turske napadnuta tri ruska tankera "flote iz sjene"
items.summary: UKRAJINSKI dronovi napali su tri tankera ruske "flote iz sjene" u Crnom moru, tvrdeći da su služili za izbjegavanje sankcija.

items.title: VIDEO Rusija postavlja nove sustave Pancir na krovove zgrada u Moskvi
items.summary: RUSIJA postavlja nove protuzračne sustave Pancir-SMD-E na krovove u Moskvi kao odgovor na pojačane ukrajinske napade dronovima. Novi sustav je specijaliziran za borbu protiv manjih zračnih ciljeva.

items.title: Smoke rises over Beirut after Israeli strike
items.summary: Footage shows smoke billowing over south Beirut following an Israeli attack on the Lebanese capital.

items.title: Hundreds flee India crackdown on undocumented migrants
items.summary: Hundreds flee India crackdown on undocumented migrants

items.title: Questions over safety as 16 pupils die in another Kenya school fire
items.summary: Several parents were still waiting for news of their children roughly 12 hours after the fire.

items.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.summary: A 31-year-old Swiss man has been arrested, police say, as images from the scene show parts of the station cordoned off.

items.title: Fire kills 16 students at Kenyan girls’ boarding school
items.summary: At least 16 students were killed and dozens injured after a fire tore through the dormitory of a girls’ school in Kenya.

items.title: Tri osobe ozlijeđene u napadu u Švicarskoj. Policija: Riječ je o terorizmu
items.summary: ŠVICARSKA policija proglasila je napad nožem u Winterthuru terorističkim činom, a uhićeni napadač ranije je širio ISIS propagandu.
